leadText: Route 15 (Japanese: １５番道路 Route 15) is a route in northern Kalos, connecting Laverre City, Dendemille Town, and Route 16. The route is also known as Brun Way (Japanese: ブラン通り Brun Way). At the gate from Laverre City, a pair of Team Flare Grunts initially block the player from entering this route. The route becomes accessible once the player defeats Bryony and Celosia at the Poké Ball Factory.

sections.title: Route description
sections.text: Route description [ edit | edit source ] Route 15 is a winding route that connects Laverre City in the west to Dendemille Town in the east. The route is laden with golden yellow leaves which may conceal items or Trainers. On the far southeast end, near the exit to Dendemille Town, is a path that leads to Route 16 . Also located on the eastern end is an entrance to the Lost Hotel .

sections.title: Items
